heading: Tools
lead:
A self-contained template.
Layout rules and style, waiting for data

features.title: A smart template
features.desc: Knows its own layout, type, colors, and brand rules. You bring the content - it handles everything else.

features.title: No design experience needed
features.desc: Authored once by someone who knows the brand. Everyone else just fills in the blanks.

features.title: Design as code
features.desc: Plain HTML, CSS, and JS. Version-controlled, diff-able, and reviewable like any other source file.

features.title: No app needed
features.desc: Open `template.html` in any browser - it just works. The tool is the app.

features.title: Free-canvas layout
features.desc: Some tools open as a direct-manipulation canvas - drag, rotate and snap boxes of text, shapes and images, exported through the same deterministic path.

features.title: Tools inside tools
features.desc: Treat a tool like an image inside another tool - a badge that renders its own QR code, a card with a live chart - and keep the smarts intact: still live, still re-rendered, never a flattened picture.

tryNow.title: Tools work fine on their own.
tryNow.desc: To render to PNG, PDF, SVG, video, and more - use the Lolly platform.
